channel.title: Pilgrim on the Path
channel.description: Real voices from the path. Each episode is one walk, recorded by a pilgrim and narrated by a voice guide. Walk. Talk. Meditate.
channel.itunes:author: walk · talk · meditate
channel.itunes:summary: Real voices from the path. Each episode is one walk, recorded by a pilgrim and narrated by a voice guide. Walk. Talk. Meditate.

item.title: Episode 1: Austin, Texas
item.description: A pilgrim in Austin, Texas. Eighty degrees, clear sky. Three kilometers on a Monday evening. They had something to say. Quite a lot, actually. About building things, breaking things, and the price of biscuits at McDonald's. No one asked them to record it. They just did. That is already more than most people managed today.
item.itunes:summary: A pilgrim in Austin, Texas. Eighty degrees, clear sky. Three kilometers on a Monday evening. They had something to say. Quite a lot, actually. About building things, breaking things, and the price of biscuits at McDonald's. No one asked them to record it. They just did. That is already more than most people managed today.
